deck.author: OpenAI Codex
deck.subject: photoGridArrangement layout definitions
deck.title: Photo Grid Demo
deck.audience: slideotter maintainers validating reusable photo-grid layouts
deck.objective: Show the three supported photoGridArrangement modes by reordering the same four images.
deck.constraints: Keep text short and let image order show the arrangement behavior.
deck.themeBrief: Clean visual test deck with teal structure, warm orange emphasis, and high-contrast image labels.
deck.outline:
1. Define the arrangement contract.
2. Lead image keeps the first image dominant.
3. Comparison rotates image two to the lead position.
4. Evidence rotates image three to the lead position.

slide-01.intent: Introduce the reusable photo-grid arrangement contract.
slide-01.layoutHint: Cover with three compact cards for the supported arrangements.
slide-01.mustInclude: The same four images appear in different orders across the deck.
slide-01.notes: Point out that the deck-local layouts live in state/layouts.json.
slide-01.title: Photo Grid Arrangement

slide-02.layoutHint: Photo-grid slide using the original image order.
slide-02.mustInclude: Lead image keeps media item 1 first.
slide-02.title: Lead image

slide-03.intent: Show comparison arrangement by rotating the second image first.
slide-03.layoutHint: Photo-grid slide using comparison media order.
slide-03.title: Comparison

slide-04.intent: Show evidence arrangement by rotating the third image first.
slide-04.layoutHint: Photo-grid slide using evidence media order.
slide-04.title: Evidence
